entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species being evaluated for water deficit response

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RESPONSE
entities.description: The physiological reaction of the plant's transpiration to water deficit

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: The condition of limited water availability for the plant

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: The controlled environment where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: The control groundnut genotype used for comparison

entities.name: WELL-WATERED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The initial growth phase where plants received sufficient water

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The condition of absence of irrigation applied to the plants

entities.name: WILTING SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The loss of turgor in plants as a response to water stress

entities.name: STAGE III
entities.description: A critical water stress stage defined by a normalized transpiration rate of less than 0.1

entities.name: NORMALIZED TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: A metric used to quantify the transpiration response

entities.name: TRANSGENIC LINES
entities.description: Genetically modified groundnut genotypes evaluated for drought response

entities.name: RD 14
entities.description: A specific transgenic groundnut line showing reduced wilting symptoms

entities.name: RD 22
entities.description: A specific transgenic groundnut line showing reduced wilting symptoms

entities.name: RD 25
entities.description: A specific transgenic groundnut line showing reduced wilting symptoms

entities.name: RD 4
entities.description: A specific transgenic groundnut line that took 52 days to reach the end point

entities.name: FRACTION OF TRANSPIRABLE SOIL WATER
entities.description: A measurement of the remaining available water in the soil

entities.name: NUMBER OF DAYS TO END POINT
entities.description: The duration from the start of stress until the plant reaches the end point

entities.name: AVERAGE LINKAGE CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group genotypes based on traits

entities.name: DENDROGRAM
entities.description: A tree-like diagram representing the results of the cluster analysis

entities.name: STOMATAL RESPONSE
entities.description: The reaction of the plant's stomata to water deficit
